ai.noStructureTooltip: The LLM could not extract structure. The scheduler ignores this rule until it is rephrased.
ai.noEmbeddingTooltip: No embedding — not searchable semantically. Edit the text to retry.
ai.okTooltip: Embedding + structure OK. The scheduler applies it.

create.descriptionNew: Write the rule in natural language. The AI generates an embedding, looks for duplicates and extracts structure for the scheduler.
create.descriptionSuggestions: The system could not apply your rule as-is (ambiguous text or missing subject). The AI proposed these alternatives. Pick one to create it, or go back to free text.
create.descriptionResult: The AI processed the rule. Review the result before closing.

fields.textPlaceholder: e.g. Pablo doesn't work on Mondays

errors.minLength: The rule must have at least 10 characters.

result.duplicateBody: The AI detected a semantically equivalent rule already in your tenant (cosine distance < 0.12). To modify it, open the existing one and edit it.
result.noStructureBody: The LLM could not parse the rule into an applicable format. The scheduler ignores it until you rephrase with clearer text.
result.noEmbeddingBody: The rule is not searchable semantically. Edit the text to retry the embedding.

editMetadata.title: Edit metadata
editMetadata.description: Cheap edits: priority, active flag, expiration. Does NOT touch the text or regenerate embeddings.

editText.title: Edit rule text
editText.description: EXPENSIVE operation: the backend regenerates the embedding and re-extracts the structure with AI (≈ 2 LLM calls).
editText.warning: This change invalidates the current vector and structure. The rule may stop applying to schedules that were already aligned with the previous text.

fields.confirm: I understand that this will be re-processed by AI.

errors.minLength: The rule must have at least 10 characters.
errors.identical: The text is identical to the current one.
